summary: Vehicle Weight Bug Fixes Testing Complete - All 11 backend tests passed, all frontend UI elements verified
seed_data_creation: Test entries created with TEST_ prefix during backend testing, automatically cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vehicle Weight bug fixes fully tested. Key fixes verified: (1) G.Issued and TP No. now save correctly on second weight completion via PUT /api/vehicle-weight/{id}/second-weight, (2) saveImage function handles non-string data (null, object, number) without crashing, (3) saveImage strips data:image/jpeg;base64 prefix correctly, (4) TP No. column visible in both VehicleWeight and AutoWeightEntries tables, (5) G.Issued and TP No. fields present in VehicleWeight entry form, (6) Pending count badge has animate-pulse class when count > 0.

backend_vehicle_weight_bugfixes.save_image_object_data_no_crash: PASS - POST with object/number image data does not crash
backend_vehicle_weight_bugfixes.edit_entry_updates_g_issued_tp_no: PASS - PUT /api/vehicle-weight/{id}/edit updates g_issued and tp_no
backend_vehicle_weight_bugfixes.list_entries_includes_g_issued_tp_no: PASS - GET /api/vehicle-weight returns entries with g_issued and tp_no fields

notes: The weighbridge/live-weight endpoint returns dummy data (connected:false) in the web/Python backend since there's no serial port. The real implementation is in desktop-app only. This is expected behavior.
